html:
Beefalo Wool is an Item obtained by either killing a Beefalo or a Baby Beefalo, or by shaving a sleeping Beefalo with a Razor (by clicking them with a Razor held by the mouse cursor). It is used to make a Saddle, Winter Hat, Beefalo Hat, Puffy Vest, and Carpeted Flooring.

Beefalo Wool also makes an excellent Fuel source for Campfires and Fire Pits. A small herd of Beefalo can easily keep a Fire Pit lit for days, and as the wool grows back, this is a good short term solution.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, there are alternative methods of obtaining Beefalo Wool; harvesting a Tumbleweed, or befriending a Catcoon, as friendly Catcoons may give Beefalo Wool as a gift.

Trivia

  • Beefalo Wool is apparently what Tallbird Nests are made out of, according to Maxwell's examination quote. ("It's made of dirty beefalo hair.")

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Beefalo Wool is an Item obtained by either killing a Beefalo or a Baby Beefalo, or by shaving a sleeping Beefalo with a Razor (by clicking them with a Razor held by the mouse cursor). It is used to make a Saddle, Winter Hat, Beefalo Hat, Puffy Vest, and Carpeted Flooring.
Beefalo Wool also makes an excellent Fuel source for Campfires and Fire Pits. A small herd of Beefalo can easily keep a Fire Pit lit for days, and as the wool grows back, this is a good short term solution.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Reign of Giants DLC, there are alternative methods of obtaining Beefalo Wool; harvesting a Tumbleweed, or befriending a Catcoon, as friendly Catcoons may give Beefalo Wool as a gift.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lông Bò Lai là Vật phẩm thu được bằng cách giết Bò Lai hoặc Bò Lai Con, hoặc cạo lông Bò Lai đang ngủ bằng Dao Cạo (bằng cách nhấp vào chúng bằng Dao Cạo được giữ bằng con trỏ chuột). Nó được sử dụng để làm Yên ngựa , Mũ mùa đông , Mũ bò lai , Áo phao và Thảm trải sàn .

'''Beefalo Wool''' is an [[Item]] obtained by either killing a [[Beefalo]] or a [[Baby Beefalo]], or by shaving a [[sleeping]] Beefalo with a [[Razor]] (by clicking them with a Razor held by the mouse cursor). It is used to make a [[Saddle]], [[Winter Hat]], [[Beefalo Hat]], [[Puffy Vest]], and [[Carpeted Flooring]].

Beefalo Wool also makes an excellent [[Fuel]] source for [[Campfire]]s and Fire Pits. A small herd of Beefalo can easily keep a Fire Pit lit for days, and as the wool grows back, this is a good short term solution.

=={{pic|32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, there are alternative methods of obtaining Beefalo Wool; harvesting a [[Tumbleweed]], or befriending a [[Catcoon]], as friendly Catcoons may give Beefalo Wool as a gift.

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Beefalo Wool
|count1 = 4
|item2 = Pig Skin
|count2 = 4
|item3 = Gold Nugget
|count3 = 4
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Saddle}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Beefalo Wool
|count1 = 4
|item2 = Silk
|count2 = 4
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Winter Hat}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Beefalo Wool
|count1 = 8
|item2 = Beefalo Horn
|tool = Science Machine
|result = Beefalo Hat}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Beefalo Wool
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Silk
|count2 = 8
|item3 = Winter Koalefant Trunk
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Puffy Vest}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Beefalo Wool
|item2 = Boards
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Carpeted Flooring}}

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Beefalo Wool is apparently what [[Tallbird Nest]]s are made out of, according to [[Maxwell (Character)|Maxwell's]] examination quote. ("It's made of dirty beefalo hair.")
